_comment: LEDGER-0020 — maps systemd unit names to operator-intent topics. Used by both check-intent-before-start.sh (Layer B) and intent-aware-unmask.sh (Layer C). Operator-editable: add a new entry when you create a new intent file that protects a unit. The drift-detector heuristics in LEDGER-0019 don't need this map; this is specifically for the unit-name → topic lookup at start-time + unmask-time.

n8n-nephew.service._note: OOM trigger per LEDGER-0007 runbook 05. Restart only via intent-aware-unmask.sh OR if n8n is migrated into LEDGER-0010 sandbox.

actions.runner.marvelousempire-red-e-pla._note: Per Avery decision 2026-05-20 — eliminating GitHub Actions from VPS.
